stemHtml:
Refer to figure. 
Given the following information, complete appropriate sections of the load sheet and find the Underload before LMC (Last Minute Change) for a Commercial Air Transport flight.

Maximum Structural TOM: 65 000 kg 
Maximum Structural Landing Mass: 61 000 kg 
Maximum Zero Fuel Mass: 57 000 kg 
Performance-limited TOM: 63 200 kg 
Dry Operating Mass: 40 750 kg 
TakeOff Fuel: 6600 kg 
Trip Fuel: 3800 kg

Passengers: 50 M, 40 F, 5 CH, 2 INF. Use all-adult-standard masses for a scheduled flight. The infants are carried by two adults, altogether occupying two passenger seats. Other load: 2000 kg of baggage in compartment No.1, and 500 kg of cargo in compartment No.4.
